meaning: submit an expense account; apply for reimbursement; write off
sentence: 出差的费用记得留发票，回来可以报销。
pinyin: Chūchāi de fèiyòng jìde liú fāpiào, huílái kěyǐ bàoxiāo.
english: Remember to keep receipts for your business trip expenses so you can get reimbursed when you return.

sentence: 她的红色连衣裙在人群中引人注目。
pinyin: Tā de hóngsè liányīqún zài rénqún zhōng yǐn rén zhù mù.
english: Her red dress was eye-catching in the crowd.

sentence: 明天冷空气来了会降温。
pinyin: Míngtiān lěng kōngqì lái le huì jiàngwēn.
english: Tomorrow's cold air will bring a drop in temperature.

sentence: 这座大桥的造价超过了十亿元。
pinyin: Zhè zuò dà qiáo de zào jià chāo guò le shí yì yuán.
english: The construction cost of this bridge exceeded one billion yuan.

sentence: 手机支付非常快捷，不用带钱包。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù fēicháng kuàijié, bù yòng dài qiánbāo.
english: Mobile payment is very quick and convenient — no need to carry a wallet.
